'''Mawshunba Zee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served under [[Sebolto]]'s employ during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He also worked for [[Sesstian Hesser]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by the [[Galactic Wildlife Liberation Front]] for the illegal breeding of wild [[Nexu/Legends|Nexu]]. The [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] worth 6,000 credits alive and 3,000 dead was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
